headline: Will Hycroft Mining’s New Dealmaker EVP Reframe Its Capital Allocation Narrative (HYMC)?
summary: Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation recently appointed Eric Colby as Executive Vice President, Corporate Development, adding nearly two decades of mining-sector operational, corporate development, and capital markets experience, including 15 years at Newmont and a senior operations role at Magris Performance Materials. By combining transaction experience across more than US$20 billion of deals with hands-on oversight of diversified mining operations, Colby’s profile strengthens Hycroft’s...
